semantic.role: TypeScript compiler configuration for the ArchSpine project's source code compilation
responsibilities: Source code transpilation from TypeScript to JavaScript
Output directory and source map generation
Type checking strictness and library inclusion
invariants: Strict mode must remain enabled to enforce type safety
Module system must be NodeNext to support ESM/CJS interop
Source maps must be generated for debugging
Output directory must be ./dist and root source directory must be ./src

English.role: Controls how TypeScript source files in the src/ directory are compiled into JavaScript output in the dist/ directory, including module format, type checking strictness, and debugging support.

parameter_definitions.target: Sets the ECMAScript target version for output; ESNext uses the latest features supported by Node.js.
parameter_definitions.module: Defines the module code generation method; NodeNext enables native ESM with CommonJS fallback.
parameter_definitions.moduleResolution: Determines how module paths are resolved; NodeNext follows Node.js resolution rules.
parameter_definitions.outDir: Specifies the output directory for compiled JavaScript files.
parameter_definitions.rootDir: Specifies the root directory of input TypeScript source files.
parameter_definitions.strict: Enables all strict type-checking options; critical for catching type errors at compile time.
parameter_definitions.esModuleInterop: Allows default imports from CommonJS modules; improves compatibility with npm packages.
parameter_definitions.skipLibCheck: Skips type checking of declaration files (.d.ts); speeds up compilation but may hide type errors in dependencies.
parameter_definitions.forceConsistentCasingInFileNames: Ensures file name casing is consistent across imports; prevents cross-platform issues.
parameter_definitions.types: Specifies type definition packages to include; here only @types/node is included.
parameter_definitions.sourceMap: Generates source map files for debugging; maps compiled JavaScript back to original TypeScript.

English.stability_and_risks: This configuration directly impacts build reliability and runtime behavior. Strict mode prevents many common JavaScript bugs at compile time. The NodeNext module system ensures compatibility with modern Node.js ESM features but may cause issues if dependencies are not ESM-compatible. Skipping lib check speeds up builds but may allow type errors in third-party libraries to go undetected. Source maps are essential for debugging but increase output size. Overall, this configuration prioritizes type safety and modern module support, which improves long-term maintainability and reduces runtime errors.

Simplified Chinese.role: 控制 ArchSpine 项目中 src/ 目录下的 TypeScript 源文件如何编译为 dist/ 目录中的 JavaScript 输出，包括模块格式、类型检查严格度和调试支持。

parameter_definitions.target: 设置输出的 ECMAScript 目标版本；ESNext 使用 Node.js 支持的最新特性。
parameter_definitions.module: 定义模块代码生成方式；NodeNext 启用原生 ESM 并兼容 CommonJS 回退。
parameter_definitions.moduleResolution: 决定模块路径的解析方式；NodeNext 遵循 Node.js 的解析规则。
parameter_definitions.outDir: 指定编译后 JavaScript 文件的输出目录。
parameter_definitions.rootDir: 指定 TypeScript 源文件的根目录。
parameter_definitions.strict: 启用所有严格类型检查选项；对于在编译时捕获类型错误至关重要。
parameter_definitions.esModuleInterop: 允许从 CommonJS 模块进行默认导入；提高与 npm 包的兼容性。
parameter_definitions.skipLibCheck: 跳过对声明文件 (.d.ts) 的类型检查；加快编译速度但可能隐藏依赖中的类型错误。
parameter_definitions.forceConsistentCasingInFileNames: 确保导入时文件名大小写一致；防止跨平台问题。
parameter_definitions.types: 指定要包含的类型定义包；此处仅包含 @types/node。
parameter_definitions.sourceMap: 生成用于调试的源映射文件；将编译后的 JavaScript 映射回原始 TypeScript。

Simplified Chinese.stability_and_risks: 此配置直接影响构建可靠性和运行时行为。严格模式在编译时防止了许多常见的 JavaScript 错误。NodeNext 模块系统确保与现代 Node.js ESM 特性的兼容性，但如果依赖项不兼容 ESM 可能会导致问题。跳过库检查可加快构建速度，但可能使第三方库中的类型错误未被检测到。源映射对于调试至关重要，但会增加输出大小。总体而言，此配置优先考虑类型安全和现代模块支持，从而提高了长期可维护性并减少了运行时错误。
